'''Jarion Monroe''' (born [[January 7]], [[1940s#1948|1948]]) is a American film, television and voice actor who has provided voices for several ''[[Star Wars]]'' video games.

{{Bio-stub}}

==Star Wars filmography==
{{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of Jarion Monroe}}
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' – Admiral [[Yamarus]]
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – [[AT-ST driver]], [[E-STAP]], General [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]]
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I: Battle for Naboo]]'' – [[Ivar Nitu]], [[Ned Greeby]], Gungan
*[[Star Wars Episode III: Revenge of the Sith (game)|''Revenge of the Sith'']] – [[IG-100 Magnaguard|Grievous' Bodyguard]]
